name: seo-uniqueness
description: Verify that the pages accessible from the main navigation menu each have a unique SEO title and meta description

testCases.name: navigation menu pages should each have a unique title and meta description
steps: Declare two module-level Maps at describe scope: 'titles: Map<string, string>' and 'descriptions: Map<string, string>'
In a SINGLE test.beforeAll, call test.setTimeout(120_000) first — navigating multiple pages sequentially exceeds the default 30s per-hook timeout

Create a new browser page, then iterate AVAILABLE PAGE ROUTES from the context to pick 3–5 locale root pages (e.g. /fr, /en, /ar — or /, /en if no locale prefix exists). For each route: titles.set(route, await page.title()), descriptions.set(route, await page.locator('meta[name="description"]').getAttribute('content') ?? '')
After collecting, add guard: test.skip([...titles.values()].every(t => t === ''), 'No titles collected — routes may not exist in this project')
Add second guard: test.skip([...descriptions.values()].every(d => d === ''), 'Meta descriptions not configured in this project')
Write four separate test() blocks — title uniqueness, title non-empty, description uniqueness, description non-empty — each reading from the shared Maps
assertions: No two navigation pages share the same title
Every navigation page has a non-empty title
No two navigation pages share the same meta description
Every navigation page has a non-empty meta description
